prompt:
A highly detailed fantasy collectible card illustration in a premium Japanese mobile RPG style, vertical trading-card layout with an ornate gold filigree frame, icy blue jewel accents, and a polished dark navy UI. The main artwork shows SERA, a divine northern priestess-warrior standing in the center foreground in a heroic full-body pose, facing forward. She wears elaborate silver-and-white ceremonial armor with engraved metalwork, fur-trimmed pauldrons, layered white fabric panels, translucent icy crystal decorations, and glowing blue gem insets. She has a very long thick blonde braid draped over the front, pale skin, and a regal, stoic expression. In her right hand she holds a long elegant ice-forged sword angled downward. Behind and beside her is a gigantic guardian tiger with white fur, dark stripes, glowing cyan eyes, and massive jagged blue crystal growths along its head, shoulders, and forelegs, posed protectively and aggressively. The background is a frozen celestial palace landscape with towering ice spires, crystalline architecture, snow particles, cold blue light, and branching lightning across a stormy night sky. The palette is dominated by white, silver, sapphire blue, cyan glow, and gold trim, with extreme detail, crisp linework, luminous magical effects, dramatic contrast, and gacha-game rarity card rendering.

Include exact card UI elements integrated into the image: at the top center a black-and-gold title plaque reading "神異 - Divine Anomaly -"; at top left a huge iridescent gold rarity emblem reading "UR" with 8 gold stars directly beneath it. At the lower center, a large black-and-gold nameplate reading "セラ / SERA" and a subtitle beneath it reading "北の都の巫女 / Priestess of the Northern Capital". Above the bottom stats bar, include 4 rectangular information panels in a 2x2 arrangement with circular icons at the left of each panel: panel 1 label "属性 / Attribute" with value "金・氷・雷" and English line "METAL + ICE + THUNDER"; panel 2 label "守護神 / Guardian Deity" with value "雷晶虎 / Thunder Crystal Tiger"; panel 3 label "役割 / Role" with value "殲滅・制圧 / Attack Control"; panel 4 label "スキル / Skill" with value "零界断罪 / Absolute Zero Verdict". At the very bottom, a 5-part stat bar with icon, label, and value for exactly these stats from left to right: "ATK 980", "DEF 870", "SPD 760", "MAG 930", "SUP 620". Keep all typography elegant, embossed, and high-fantasy, with bilingual Japanese and English text, glossy card-game finish, symmetrical composition, and luxurious premium card presentation.
